open.description: Evotel has informed us of a network outage affecting Kroondal, affected clients will experience degraded service. Evotel engineers are working on resolving this issue as soon as possible. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused.

updates.content:
Evotel technical team has confirmed that the network disruption was caused by a fibre cable that was accidentally damaged during maintenance work.

The civil works team is onsite carrying out the necessary repairs. Once completed, technicians will restore and test the affected section of the network to ensure stable connectivity

open.title: Evotel outage | Upington
open.description: Evotel has informed us of a network outage affecting Upington, affected clients will experience limited to no connectivity. Evotel engineers are working on resolving this issue as soon as possible. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused.

updates.content: Technicians are still conducting street-by-street checks to identify and resolve any remaining faults, ensuring that each affected client is restored as quickly as possible.
Evotel technicians are still conducting street-by-street checks to identify and resolve any remaining faults, ensuring that each affected client is restored as quickly as possible.

The majority of clients have been restored, and our technical team is back on site working to reconnect the remaining affected clients.

We sincerely apologise for the inconvenience and will provide further updates as restoration progresses.

The Evotel team is currently completing the fibre splicing process. As splicing progresses, services will begin restoring in phases. Final testing will then be conducted to ensure the stability of the network.

We sincerely apologise for the inconvenience and thank you for your continued patience and understanding as Evotel technicians work to restore all services as quickly and safely as possible.
Evotel's team remains actively engaged in the repair process. Work is ongoing to resolve the remaining faults with every effort being made to restore services as safely and efficiently as possible.

Evotel team is back on site this morning and has resumed repair work to restore services in the affected area.

We appreciate your continued patience and understanding while these efforts are underway. Further updates will be shared as progress is made.

Thank you for your patience and understanding
